overview: mini Kore is a luxury artisanal chocolate boutique — a quiet luxury e-commerce experience featuring an interactive 5-step chocolate configurator where customers build their perfect geometric heart chocolate. The app combines high-fashion aesthetics with Framer Motion animations, a live product visualizer, dynamic pricing, and WhatsApp ordering.
features: Interactive 5-step chocolate configurator with live heart visualization
360° heart rotation animation on base change
Particle drop animations for ingredient selection
WhatsApp deep-link ordering with full config summary
Mobile-first layout with floating WhatsApp action button
Quiet luxury design: Playfair Display serif, bone white, sage green, aged gold
Backend order persistence with full configuration storage
